item.title: LEGO 75954 Harry Potter Hogwarts Great Hall Castle Toy Gift Idea for Wizarding World Fan Building Set for Kids
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 75954 Harry Potter Hogwarts Great Hall Castle Toy Gift Idea for Wizarding World Fan Building Set for Kids here: ℹ️: This Hogwarts Castles Great Hall toy is a great birthday or Christmas Harry Potter Gift for kids who love the Wizarding World adventures! Includes 10 minifigures: Harry Potter, Ron Weasley, Hermione Granger, Draco Malfoy, Susan Bones, Professor McGonagall, and Albus Dumbledore This castles toy for kids 4-level tower features movable Grand Staircase spiral steps at its base, potions room, treasure room with chest Also includes Professor Quirrell with dual Lord Voldemort face, Hagrid, Nearly Headless Nick, buildable Basilisk plus Hedwig & Scabbers figures The castles turret features the Mirror of Erised with changeable pictures and roosting spot for Fawkes figure Accessory elements include 7 wands, 3 tumblers, an umbrella, lantern, broom, sorting hat, cauldrons, potions, candles, brooms and many more Features Hogwarts Castles Great Hall with house banners, tower with movable spiral staircase, potions room and treasure room!

item.title: LEGO Gabby s Dollhouse Toy Playset 4-Floor & 8-Room Dollhouse with Gabby Pandy Paws MerCat and Cakey figures plus Accessories Gift Toys for 4 Plus Year Old Girls Boys & Kids 10788
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Gabby s Dollhouse Toy Playset 4-Floor & 8-Room Dollhouse with Gabby Pandy Paws MerCat and Cakey figures plus Accessories Gift Toys for 4 Plus Year Old Girls Boys & Kids 10788 at the following link: ℹ️: Gabbys Dollhouse toys for girls and boys let kids aged 4+ join in the fun with Gabby minifigure, plus Pandy Paws, MerCat and Cakey figures Kids can play piano in the Gabbys Dollhouse music room, take a nap in the bedroom or party on the rooftops rotatable dance floor Treat DreamWorks Animation TV shows fans to a 4-floor, 8-room Gabbys Dollhouse toy with this LEGO playset with 4 characters and accessories Includes Gabbys Dollhouse accessories: a cupcake, scissors, paint brush, hairbrush, shampoo bottle, flower, microphone, guitar and much more Kids can bake in the kitchen, use a slide in the playroom or get creative in one of 8 activity-filled rooms connected by a cat-a-vator lift LEGO Gabbys Dollhouse toys for girls, boys and kids aged 4+ introduce to creative building and make a fun birthday gift or Christmas present idea With a Starter Brick and simple picture building steps, building this cat-shaped dollhouse is fast and fun, helping kids to develop key skills 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Technic Bugatti Bolide Racing Car Model Building Set Race Engineering Toys Collectible Iconic Sports Vehicle Construction Kit for 9 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls 42151
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Technic Bugatti Bolide Racing Car Model Building Set Race Engineering Toys Collectible Iconic Sports Vehicle Construction Kit for 9 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls 42151 here: ℹ️: Motorsport fans and race car enthusiasts can explore the stunning design of the Bugatti Bolide with this LEGO Technic model race car building kit With realistic movement and authentic features based on the original car model, the build features a working W16 engine, steering and scissor doors With yellow and black colour theme and sticker detail that adds the finishing touch, this toy car model looks great on display in kids’ rooms The Bugatti Bolide stretches the possibilities of motorsport technology; let your kids build this LEGO Technic model of the iconic racing car This LEGO Technic Bugatti Bolide car toy model building set makes a great Christmas gift for boys and girls aged 9 plus and helps to introduce kids to engineering 🛒 Buy it now!
